Name: GarageCutsceneParam
Description: Determines the handling of garage cutscenes.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Default Starting Cutscene
Fields.Description: The default cutscene to play when starting a mission.

Fields.Name: Default Ending Cutscene
Fields.Description: The default cutscene to play when ending a mission.

Fields.Name: Default Failure Cutscene
Fields.Description: The default cutscene to play when failing a mission.

Fields.Name: Starting Cutscene Variant: 1
Fields.Description: A variant of the starting cutscene.
